title: rudbeckia triloba var. beadlei
intro: Rudbeckia triloba var. beadlei, also known as the Brown-Eyed Susan, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene and triterpene compounds. The health benefits of Rudbeckia triloba var. beadlei include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
